message:
feat(ars): add historical replay validation harness for reflex promotion

Implements ft-tkpgy.5.1: dry-run reflex commands against historical
incidents to prove they would have worked. Jaccard command similarity,
bigram text similarity, pass rate gating. 26 inline tests + 13 proptests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
